summary: Code review and verification of Premium tab feature and cooldown timer for password reset. This is an Expo/React Native mobile app - the web browser only shows a blank page due to 'import.meta' Metro bundling issue. Code review confirms all requested features are correctly implemented.

code_bugs_fixed.fix: Added import for useAuthStore from authStore

code_bugs_fixed.issue: TypeScript error - NodeJS.Timeout type incompatible with browser setInterval return

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Premium tab added to _layout.tsx with star icon and 'Premium' title (line 79-86)
✓ Premium page (premium.tsx) has complete implementation with:
- Hero section with 'Uppgradera till Premium' title
- Two pricing cards: 19 kr/mån (monthly) and 149 kr/år (yearly)

- All 10 premium features with icons (AI Dagsrapport, Äggprognos, AI-rådgivare Agda, Hälsologg, Kläckningsmodul, Foderhantering, Vädertips, Avancerad statistik, Obegränsad historik, Obegränsade flockar)
- CTA button 'Prenumerera via honsgarden.se' triggers Alert with redirect option
- 60 second cooldown starts after requesting reset code
- Button shows 'Skicka ny kod (Xs)' during countdown
- Button is disabled during cooldown (disabled={isLoading || resendCooldown > 0})
- startCooldown() called in both handleForgotPassword and handleResendCode
NOTE: The Expo app doesn't render properly on web browser (blank page) due to Metro bundling 'import.meta' issue - this is a pre-existing limitation, not related to the new features
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is an Expo/React Native mobile app that doesn't fully render on web browsers. The web version at /api/web/login is a separate React build. Premium tab is ONLY in the mobile Expo app (_layout.tsx), NOT in the web app. To fully test the mobile UI, use Expo Go app on a physical device or simulator. Code review confirms all features are correctly implemented.

premium_tab_visible.details: Premium tab added with star icon and title 'Premium'

pricing_cards.details: Monthly: 19 kr/mån, Yearly: 149 kr/år with 'SPARA 35%' badge

premium_features_list.details: All 10 features with icons defined in PREMIUM_FEATURES array

faq_section.details: 2 FAQ items about web payment and cancellation

cta_button_with_alert.details: handleSubscribe shows Alert with Avbryt/Öppna webbsidan options, redirects to honsgarden.se/premium

cooldown_timer.details: 60 second cooldown, starts via startCooldown(), shows 'Skicka ny kod (Xs)' format

resend_button_disabled.details: Button disabled when resendCooldown > 0 or isLoading
